LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CERCLE DE L'UNION, DBA THE FRENCH CLUB'S (THE FRENCH CLUB) DEMURRER TO 7TH, 8TH, 9TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION IN COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 4, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CERCLE DE L'UNION, DBA THE FRENCH CLUB'S (THE FRENCH CLUB) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRERS TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, AND 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL TERMINATION ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE TIME BARRED PURSUANT TO CCP 335.1. THE DEMURRER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF FEHA IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW THAT ITS SETTLEMENT WITH THE DFEH BARS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE LETTER OF JUNE 6, 2012, STATES THAT THE RIGHT TO SUE NOTICE REMAINED UNCHANGED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CERCLE DE L'UNION, DBA THE FRENCH CLUB'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS BASED ON PLAINTIFFS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURTS APRIL 7TH ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER OF APRIL 7, 2014 COMPELLING PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DISCOERY MATTERS. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL SIGN AN ORDER DISMISSING PLAINTIFF'S ACTION TO THE PROVISIONS OF SECTION 22023.030(D)(3) UNLESS WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF FILES FOR AND COMPLETE RESPONSES CALLED FOR BY THE COURT'S ORDER OF APRIL 7TH AND PAYS THE MONETARY SANCTIONS IMPOSED IN THAT ORDER. ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Based On Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Courts April 7th Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicole Meredith, Esq. of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP,(415-398-0200) for Cercle De L"Union, Defendant and moving party.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling and orders as follows: DEFENDANT CERCLE DE L'UNION, DBA THE FRENCH CLUB's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Based On Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Courts April 7th Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is Granted. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER OF APRIL 7, 2014 COMPELLING PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DISCOERY MATTERS. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL SIGN AN ORDER DISMISSING PLAINTIFF'S ACTION TO THE PROVISIONS OF SECTION 22023.030(d)(3) UNLESS WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF FILES FOR AND COMPLETE RESPONSES CALLED FOR BY THE COURT'S ORDER OF APRIL 7TH AND PAYS THE MONETARY SANCTIONS IMPOSED IN THAT ORDER.
Order granting motion for terminating sanctions is signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ernesto Sanchez, Esq. of Liberation Law Group PC, Tel. 415.695.1000, for plaintiff and moving party;
Nicole Meredith, Esq. of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel. 415.398.0200, for defendant, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. For good cause shown and there being no opposition filed, ERNESTO SANCHEZ, ESQ.'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Plaintiff Gustavo Rios is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interoggs
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Nicole L. Meredith, Esq. of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP, Tel. 415.398.0200, for defendant and moving party;
Ernesto Sanchez, Esq. of Liberation Law Group, PC, Tel. 415.695.1000, for plaintiff.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CERCLE DE L'UNION, DBA THE FRENCH CLUB'S (THE FRENCH) Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interoggatories is Granted. The motion is not opposed. Plaintiff shall produce verified responses, without objections, within 10 days of the date of the Order. Plaintiff shall also produce documents responsive to Defendant's requests within 10 days of the date of the Order. Plaintiffs request for monetary sanctions is Granted in the amount of $367.50. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey R. Windsor; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: DEFENDANT CERCLE DE L'UNION, DBA THE FRENCH CLUB'S (THE FRENCH CLUB) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. The demurrers to the 7th cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress, 8th cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress, and 10th cause of action for wrongful termination are sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff concedes these causes of action are time barred pursuant to CCP 335.1. The demurrer to the 9th cause of action for violation of FEHA is overruled. Defendant fails to show that its settlement with the DFEH bars plaintiff's claim. The letter of June 6, 2012, states that the right to sue notice remained unchanged. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
